shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up framing centered on a small rectangular marble tray positioned slightly right of center in the 9:16 frame, with surrounding wooden surface visible
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the marble tray
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a shallow depth of field focusing sharply on the tray and its contents, softly blurred background
environment_description: smooth wooden furniture surface with a beige wall in the background and partial view of a green plant out of focus to the left; a wooden framed mirror partially visible on the right
subject_description: a small rectangular white marble tray with rounded edges and gold ball feet displaying a pair of car keys with black key fobs, six coins including one gold coin and five silver coins, and a small gold-colored brass statue of the Hindu deity Ganesha seated with one hand raised
motion_behavior: static realistic placement with natural gravity effects on keys, coins, and statue
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, and warm with a calm and serene ambiance
